reasons: Lolita protects Kimmy's firing lane by blocking projectile pressure that would force Kimmy to stop poking.
Lolita's frontline protection gives Kimmy more time to keep moving and dealing continuous damage from behind the formation.

proof.summary: Kimmy needs a safe angle to keep firing, while Lolita can protect the front angle and reduce projectile pressure aimed at Kimmy.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stands between Kimmy and the main ranged damage threat.
Kimmy plays behind Lolita instead of stepping past the shield angle.
failureCases: Enemy assassins flank around Lolita's shield.
Lolita uses the shield too early or faces the wrong direction.

reasons: Angela can attach to Kimmy during enemy dive windows, giving Kimmy shield and healing support while she continues moving.
Angela's slow support helps Kimmy kite nearby threats and maintain continuous damage uptime.

proof.summary: Angela gives Kimmy extra safety during enemy commit windows, letting Kimmy keep fighting while protected by shield, heal, and slow support.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves her attach for the enemy's real dive.
Kimmy keeps moving while Angela slows nearby threats.
failureCases: Angela attaches after Kimmy is already controlled or burst down.
Enemy burst waits until Angela's shield value is gone.

reasons: Mathilda gives Kimmy an extra reposition option when enemies dive her firing angle.
Mathilda's shield and movement support help Kimmy keep attacking after adjusting her spacing.

proof.summary: Kimmy depends on spacing for damage uptime, and Mathilda can help her reposition without fully giving up the fight.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda stays close enough for Kimmy to use the mobility option.
Kimmy uses the reposition to maintain range rather than chase too far.
failureCases: Mathilda dives too deep and leaves Kimmy without peel.

reasons: Tigreal can group and stun enemies, giving Kimmy easier targets for sustained spray damage and ultimate follow-up.
Tigreal's hard engage forces enemies to answer the frontline instead of freely diving Kimmy.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates a grouped crowd-control window, while Kimmy follows from range with continuous damage.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Kimmy is already in follow-up range.
Kimmy saves her stronger damage window for enemies held by Tigreal's crowd control.
failureCases: Tigreal engages too far ahead of Kimmy.
Enemy backline avoids the grouped engage and dives Kimmy directly.

reasons: Floryn can support Kimmy even when Kimmy is separated in mid or gold lane positioning.
Global healing helps Kimmy survive poke, dive, or low-health retreat windows.

proof.summary: Kimmy often plays around spacing and chip damage, and Floryn's global heal can keep Kimmy alive without requiring tight formation.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves her ultimate for enemy commit or heavy poke.
Kimmy retreats while still staying within a safe damage angle.
failureCases: Kimmy is burst down before the heal matters.
Anti-heal or heavy burst reduces the value of sustain.
